lang_picker_subtitle: Choose the language you're comfortable with
welcome_heading: Know what your gold is worth
welcome_body: Photograph your jewelry from home. Get an instant, calibrated loan estimate — no branch visit, no agent required.
welcome_hero_title: Gold Assessment for Instant Loan Eligibility
consent_body: We will capture photos and a short video of your jewelry to estimate its loan value. Your data stays in India, is encrypted, and will be deleted after {{days}} days.
otp_body: We'll send a one-time code to confirm your identity.
setup_body: Place your jewelry on a plain light-colored surface with a ₹10 coin beside it.
setup_tip1: Use natural daylight or a well-lit room
setup_tip2: Plain white / cream surface works best
setup_tip3: Keep the ₹10 coin in every shot — it's our scale reference
step_45_hint: Tilt your phone slightly to show depth
step_macro_hint: Zoom in on the BIS stamp — must be sharp
step_video_hint: Slowly circle the jewelry while recording
step_audio_hint: Drop the piece from 2–3 cm onto a hard surface and record the sound
step_selfie_hint: Hold the piece in your hand and take a selfie — this prevents fraud
quality_dark: Too dark — move to brighter light
quality_no_coin: ₹10 coin not detected — move it into frame
quality_too_small: Jewelry too small in frame — move closer
weight_body: Weigh your jewelry on a kitchen scale and enter the value below.
weight_tip: Don't have a scale? We'll use an estimate — accuracy may be lower.
fail_body: Our confidence score is {{score}}%. We recommend in-branch verification before approval.
error_camera: Camera access denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
error_upload: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
dashboard_start_subtitle: Get instant loan eligibility in a few minutes
dashboard_no_assessments_sub: Start your first gold assessment above
detail_notes_placeholder: Enter notes for field agent or audit log...
detail_not_found: Session not found or not finalized.
agent_step2_desc: Record ground truth values at the customer location.
agent_notes_placeholder: Optional notes on customer behavior or item condition...
agent_disbursed_desc: Ground truth recorded. The active learning pipeline thanks you.
consent_privacy1: We will use your data only for gold loan assessment
consent_privacy2: Your data is encrypted and stored securely
consent_privacy3: We do not share your data without your consent
routing_instant_desc: Your jewelry meets all criteria for instant approval. An agent will visit within 2 hours.
routing_agent_desc: A physical XRF assay is required. Our agent will visit at your convenience.
routing_recapture_desc: Some captures were unclear. Better photos will improve our confidence.
routing_reject_desc: We couldn't build enough confidence for pre-qualification. In-branch verification is recommended.
tutorial_hint_certificate: Ensure the document is completely flat, well-lit, and the entire page is visible within the frame.
voice_45deg: Now, take a photo of the jewelry and coin from a 45 degree angle, exactly like this.
voice_top: Step 2. Place your gold jewellery flat on a surface. Point your camera straight down from the top and tap Capture.
voice_side: Step 3. Hold the gold piece upright and shoot from the side. Tap Capture.
voice_macro: Next, take a close-up photo of the hallmark on your jewelry, just like this.
voice_certificate: Now, take a clear photo of the jewelry bill or certificate, exactly like this.
voice_audio: Please describe any specific details, markings, or defects on the jewellery aloud.
voice_video: Please record a 15-second video showing the jewellery from all angles.
voice_selfie: Finally, take a quick selfie to confirm your identity, like this.
speak_analysing: Got it. Analysing your image now, please wait.
speak_all_done: All done! Submitting your gold for assessment now.
fb_approved: Perfect — this shot looks great. You're good to continue.
fb_selfie_ok: Great, your identity photo is clear. You're all set to continue.
fb_macro_ok: Clear shot of the hallmark — we've captured the marking.
fb_macro_karat: We've read a {{karat}} hallmark on your piece. Looks great.
fb_macro_priced: We've read a {{karat}} hallmark — estimated ₹{{price}} per gram at today's rate.
fb_no_gold: We couldn't spot any gold jewellery in this shot. Please place your piece in frame and try again.
fb_no_coin: We need the ₹10 coin beside your jewellery as a size reference. Please add it to the frame and retake.
fb_coin_cut: The ₹10 coin is partly out of frame. Please bring it fully into view and retake.
fb_coin_upright: The ₹10 coin is standing on its edge. Please lay it flat beside your jewellery and retake.
fb_blurry: The photo came out a little blurry. Hold steady for a moment and retake.
fb_dark: It's a bit too dark to see clearly. Move to brighter light and retake.
fb_no_hallmark: We couldn't find the hallmark marking. Move in closer to the stamp and retake.
fb_selfie_retry: We need to see your face and the jewellery together. Please retake the photo.
fb_reject_generic: This shot didn't quite work. Please adjust and retake.
tutorial_video_soon: Tutorial video coming soon. Follow the hint below.
tut_hint_top: Hold your gold jewellery flat on a surface. Point the camera straight down from above.
tut_hint_45deg: Tilt the camera to a 45 degree angle so you can see both the top surface and the depth of the piece.
tut_hint_side: Hold the camera at table height, level with the edge of the gold, to show its thickness.
tut_hint_selfie: Hold the gold piece beside your face. Both your face and the gold must be clearly visible.
tut_hint_macro: Get very close to the BIS hallmark or purity stamp. The text should fill the frame.
tut_hint_video: Place the gold on a white surface. Slowly rotate the piece for 15 seconds, showing all edges, clasps, and the hallmark area.
tut_hint_audio: Drop the gold once from 15 to 20 centimetres onto glass, or tap it with a coin edge, then leave it. The 5-second recording captures the full ring. Keep the room quiet.
tut_hint_certificate: Scan the original purchase bill or authenticity certificate. Make sure the HUID and purity stamp are clearly visible.
speak_demo_error: Error loading the example image. Please try capturing instead.
weight_speak_manual: If you know the weight of your jewellery, enter it here. If not, let our AI estimate it from your photos.
weight_speak_ai: Place the jewellery photos for weight estimation.
weight_q_sub: Entering the exact weight gives the most accurate valuation. If you don't know it, let our AI estimate it from your photos.
weight_bill_note: Pre-filled from your bill — the most reliable weight. Edit it only if it's wrong.
weight_ai_card_sub: Estimate it with AI from your top, 45° and side photos.
weight_opt_sub: Use top, 45-degree, and side photos for a better estimate.
weight_prefilled_note: Images pre-filled from your capture session. You can replace any by tapping.
view_top_hint: Flat overhead photo for diameter and outline. Coin must be fully visible.
view_45_hint: Tilted photo to validate profile and reflective edges.
view_side_hint: Profile photo for actual thickness. Coin must stay in frame.
weight_tap_hint: Optional: tap the jewellery in the top view if the automatic selector misses it. Avoid tapping the coin.
ref_obj_sub: The ₹10 Indian coin (27 mm) is used as the size reference for scaling.
views_verified: Top, 45° and side views verified · {{pct}}% ROI confidence
view_skipped: This view was skipped during capture.
weight_need_three: Upload all three required photos: top view, 45-degree view, and side view. Keep the ₹10 coin visible in each.
weight_invalid: Enter a valid weight in grams (e.g. 12.5).
weight_bad_image: Upload a JPG, PNG, or HEIC image.
reg_h1_sub: Enter your full name as per your ID.
reg_h2_sub: Used for KYC and eligibility checks.
reg_h3_sub: Helps us apply the right loan rates.
reg_h4_sub: We'll send a one-time code to verify.
reg_h6_sub: Used to access the app quickly.
reg_feat_kyc_sub: Your profile is verified and ready.
reg_err_min_age: Applicant must be at least 21 years old.
reg_err_max_age: Applicant must be 65 years old or younger.
login_err_not_registered: This number is not registered. Please register first.
login_err_no_pin: PIN is not set for this number. Register again and verify OTP to set your PIN.
login_err_verify: Could not verify phone number. Please try again.
